# Type

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit field.

## Overview

Contains the four-character code `'frma'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the format atom.
- **Data format**: A 32-bit integer indicating the format of the stored data.
